title: head.json — a 'head' (mind-node)
description: Pointer to a person's searchable corpus (the 'body' of work) and the connection manifest (the 'spine') built by searching that corpus at multiple resolutions.

id.description: Stable slug for this head, e.g. 'defender'.

aliases.description: Other identities that resolve to this same head (e.g. Omar / Defender).

headshot.description: Path or URL to the head photo. Commit a local file under assets/ for portability.

corpus.description: The searchable 'body' of work. Each entry is a link to a corpus node plus how it is searched.

type.description: What kind of corpus node this is.

search.description: How to search it: a URL template with {q}, a CLI, or 'manual'.

spine.description: Connection manifest: things attached to this mind at various resolutions, derived from searching the corpus.

grain.description: Coarse (whole corpus) -> fine (single claim). One of coarse|medium|fine|atom.

resolution.description: Which resolution tier it lives at (must match a resolutions[].name).

target.description: What it connects to (another head id, a project, a concept).

evidence.description: Search strings / corpus links that justify the connection.
